visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on two men sitting side-by-side in a dimly lit, cool-toned room. The man on the left, in sharp focus, is of East Asian descent and wears glasses, a white collared shirt, and a dark tie. He has a serious, concerned expression as he looks slightly off-camera. The man to his right is out of focus, appearing as a blurred figure in a light-colored shirt. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains static, creating a tense and focused atmosphere. The audio features a man speaking in a serious and concerned tone. His voice is steady but carries a sense of urgency and worry as he delivers the lines, "有很多弟兄跑了，林叔不知道" (Many of our brothers have run away, Uncle Lin doesn't know). The background is quiet, with no discernible music or sound effects, placing all the focus on the gravity of his words.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man standing in what appears to be an office or control room. He is of East Asian descent and is dressed in a white button-down shirt, a black tie, and dark trousers. An ID badge hangs from a lanyard around his neck
